title: Starlight Preserved
description: Starlight Preserved is a lightweight server backup mod for Fabric that automatically backs up your world at configurable intervals, so you never have to worry about losing progress.
body:
# Starlight Preserved

**Starlight Preserved** is a lightweight server-side backup mod for Fabric that automatically backs up your world at configurable intervals, so you never have to worry about losing progress.

## Features
- **Automatic backups:** backs up your world at a configurable interval
- **Safe saves:** flushes all world data to disk before zipping to ensure a clean backup
- **Disk space check:** skips backup and warns if there isn't enough disk space
- **Player notifications:** broadcasts backup status to all online players
- **Configurable:** tweak backup interval, max backups to keep, and more via a simple JSON config file

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## Client Side Optional
Starlight Preserved works when only installed on the server, players do not need it on their client.
